title: Add phx-debounce to a search input
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/search_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SearchLive) that renders a <form phx-change="search"> with a single <input name="q" phx-debounce="300">. Add a handle_event("search", %{"q" => q}, socket) that assigns :query to the q value. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :query, "")}. Use ~H.
tier_rationale: Single attribute addition. Canonical fix for keystroke flooding per Hex Shift '10 biggest mistakes'.
research_citation: Hex Shift Ten Biggest LiveView Mistakes #4: 'Not debouncing or rate limiting'
